title: Assorted Color Baby Shower Pacifiers - Pack of 18 - Perfect Baby Shower Party Favors, Photo Props, and Decorations
features: ASSORTED COLOR BABY SHOWER PACIFIERS: Add a pop of color and excitement to your baby shower with our vibrant, assorted color pacifiers; available in a variety of shades perfect for any theme or color scheme.

PACK OF 18: Generously sized pack to ensure you have plenty of adorable, eye-catching pacifiers for your baby shower; ideal for use as favors, decorations, or photo props, creating lasting memories of the special day.

VERSATILE & FUNCTIONAL: Perfect for baby shower games or as placeholders for your guests; these pacifiers can also be used as embellishments on invitations, thank you cards, or as cake toppers, adding an extra touch to your event.

HIGH-QUALITY & DURABLE: Crafted from premium materials, these charming and fun baby shower pacifiers are built to last throughout all your event's activities, ensuring consistent quality and a souvenir guests can keep.

CAPTURE THE MOMENT: Transform your baby shower into an unforgettable celebration with our assorted color baby shower Pacifiers; the perfect addition to create an engaging and memorable experience for everyone in attendance.
description: Product Description Thank all the guests who came to your party and send them home with these party favors featuring pacifiers in assorted colors. Your guests will be thrilled to take home these party favors as a memento of your occasion. Box Contains 1 x 18 PACIFIERS-ASSORTED
